hero.title: Model excellence
hero.subtitle: A collaborative space where NLP practitioners and researchers create, test and evolve models in service of human transformation.

welcome.title: New to the Lab?
welcome.subtitle: This site is a collaborative lab where NLP practitioners share, test and evolve models. Here's where to start:
welcome.exploreLibraryDesc: Browse approaches, tools and experiences documented by the community.
welcome.readResourcesDesc: Guides, NLP glossary and methodology to understand our approach.
welcome.joinCommunityDesc: Connect with practitioners, ask questions and share your discoveries.
welcome.supportDesc: This Lab is free and open. Your donation helps keep it running.

library.title: Model Library
library.subtitle: Explore validated NLP models
library.pipelineDesc: Overview of the research pipeline — each column represents a stage in the model lifecycle.
library.byApproachDesc: Explore models organized by approach. Click an approach to see its tools and experiences.
library.unlinkedDesc: Models not linked to an approach
library.noApproachYet: No approach has been created yet.
library.noLinkedModels: No models linked to this approach
library.approachesDesc: Coherent architectures grouping several models around a vision
library.toolsDesc: Protocols, formats and techniques usable in sessions
library.experiencesDesc: Maps of lived experiences, problem or resource states

auth.loginSubtitle: Access the NLP R&D Lab community
auth.forgotSubtitle: Enter your email to receive a reset link
auth.pnlQuestion: In NLP, we say that 'the map is not the ...'
auth.signupSuccess: Account created! Check your email to confirm your registration.
auth.forgotSuccess: Email sent! Check your inbox to reset your password.
auth.pnlAnswerWrong: The answer to the NLP question is incorrect

community.title: Community
community.subtitle: Connect with NLP practitioners and researchers
community.contentPlaceholder: Share your thoughts, questions or discoveries...
community.noPosts: No posts yet. Be the first to publish!
community.deletePostMessage: The post and all its comments will be deleted. This action is irreversible.

contribute.title: Propose a model
contribute.subtitle: Your model will be submitted for validation by an administrator before being visible in the library.
contribute.loginSubtitle: Sign in to propose a new NLP model
contribute.derivedFrom: This model will be derived from
contribute.workflowStep2: An admin validates → the model becomes a Draft
contribute.summaryPlaceholder: Describe your model in 1 to 3 sentences
contribute.descriptionPlaceholder: Detailed content of the model. Use ## to structure into sections.
contribute.submitSuccess: Model submitted! An administrator must validate it before it appears in the library.

sections.signalsPlaceholder: What signals help identify this experience? (bodily, verbal, behavioral...)
sections.intervention_pointsPlaceholder: Where can one intervene to modify the experience?
sections.active_principlePlaceholder: What is the core mechanism that produces the change?
sections.vigilancePlaceholder: Situations where the tool doesn't work well, contraindications, common mistakes...
sections.variantsPlaceholder: Adaptations or variants of this tool used by other practitioners...
sections.creatorsPlaceholder: Who created or developed this approach?
sections.structurePlaceholder: Architecture or components of this approach, how it articulates...
sections.toolkitPlaceholder: The tools and models associated with this approach...

profile.title: My profile
profile.bioPlaceholder: A sentence or two about yourself...
profile.cvDesc: Describe your background, training, experience. Visible on your public profile.
profile.cvPlaceholder: Your NLP journey, training, certifications, areas of expertise, notable experiences...
profile.personalLinksDesc: Website, LinkedIn, YouTube channel, training page...
profile.noLinks: No links. Add your links so visitors can contact or follow you.

resources.title: Resources
resources.subtitle: Guides, methodology and NLP knowledge base
resources.freeContent: This content is free — support us

events.title: Events
events.subtitle: Work sessions, meetings and NLP workshops
events.noEvents: No events scheduled at this time.
events.registerSuccess: Registered! You'll receive details by email.
events.emailError: Error sending email. Check that the Resend key is configured.

contributors.title: Contributors
contributors.subtitle: The practitioners who bring this Lab to life. Their curiosity, expertise and generosity build a unique NLP library, open to all.

soutenir.title: Support the Lab
soutenir.thankYouMessage: Your donation directly contributes to maintaining and evolving this platform. Every contribution counts and helps us keep this Lab open and free for all NLP practitioners.
soutenir.canceled: Payment was cancelled. You can try again whenever you like.
soutenir.whyP1: The NLP Lab R&D Collective is an independent, open and free project. No ads, no paywall, no data resale. Just a workspace serving NLP practitioners.
soutenir.whyP2: Maintaining this platform has a cost: server, database, domain name, development tools, and most importantly the time spent developing new features, fixing bugs and supporting the community.
soutenir.whyP3: Your donation — even a modest one — helps us keep this Lab alive and evolve it according to the community's needs. Every contribution makes a real difference.
soutenir.coffeeSubtitle: 5€ — the price of a good espresso
soutenir.securePayment: Secure payment via Stripe. No banking data is stored on our servers.
soutenir.paymentError: Error creating payment. Please try again.

admin.title: Administration
admin.subtitle: Platform overview and management
admin.maxImageSizeDesc: Images uploaded to models that exceed this size will be rejected.
admin.translationDashboardDesc: Overview of models, translations and cross-language inconsistencies
admin.inconsistencyApproachMismatch: Different approach between the two languages
admin.inconsistencyBidirectional: Both models point to each other (loop)

modelDetail.deleteMessage: The model "{{title}}" will be permanently deleted, along with its variations and feedbacks. This action is irreversible.
modelDetail.summaryPlaceholder: Concise description of the model in 1 to 3 sentences
modelDetail.noLinks: No links. Add videos, documents or trainings related to this model.
modelDetail.journalDesc: Describe what changed. This entry will be added to the journal with the version, date and contributors.
modelDetail.journalPlaceholder: E.g.: Added active principle, fixed prerequisites, kinesthetic variant...
modelDetail.youAreContributor: You are listed as a contributor to this change.
modelDetail.noContent: Detailed content will be added soon.
modelDetail.noLinksYet: No links yet. Click Edit to add videos, documents or trainings.
modelDetail.noDiscussions: No discussions about this model yet.
modelDetail.writeFeedback: Share your experience with this model...
modelDetail.feedbackSuccess: Feedback sent! Thank you for your contribution.
modelDetail.derivedFromParent: This model was created as a variation of the parent model
modelDetail.variantExplanation: A variant is a complete model, derived from this one, that adapts or enriches the protocol for a particular case.
modelDetail.feedbackExplanation: Your feedback will be published as a post in the community, linked to this model.
modelDetail.noDiscussionsYet: No discussions yet. Be the first to share your experience!
modelDetail.donationSuffix: to keep this content free and open.

language.translationCreated: Version created! You can now write the translation.
language.linkedTranslationDesc: Link this model to its translation in the other language
language.approcheSyncTitle: Sync approach in the other language?
language.approcheSyncBothExist: The model '{{modelTitle}}' ({{modelLang}}) and the approach '{{approcheTitle}}' ({{approcheLang}}) exist in the other language. Do you want to associate them too?
language.approcheSyncMissingModel: The model doesn't exist yet in {{lang}}. Do you want to create it (empty) and associate it with '{{approcheTitle}}' ({{approcheLang}})?
language.approcheSyncMissingApproche: The approach '{{approcheTitle}}' doesn't exist yet in {{lang}}. Do you want to create it (empty) and associate '{{modelTitle}}' ({{modelLang}}) with it?
language.approcheSyncMissingBoth: Neither the model nor the approach '{{approcheTitle}}' exist in {{lang}}.
language.syncDone: Association created in the other language
language.syncCreated: Model created and associated in the other language
